company.name: Power On Interio
company.tagline: Commercial and residential interiors planned with clarity and delivered with care.
company.description: Power On Interio is an interior design company serving clients across India, planning and delivering commercial offices, homes, kitchens, wardrobes, and turnkey interiors in Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Mumbai, Pune, Delhi NCR, Ahmedabad, Kolkata, Jaipur, Kochi, Coimbatore, and other major cities.
company.location: Across India, including Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Chennai, Mumbai, Pune, Delhi NCR, Ahmedabad, Kolkata, Jaipur, Kochi, and Coimbatore
company.heroDescription: We create commercial offices, homes, and utility-led interiors that balance function, finish quality, and day-to-day usability.
